AdditionalAttributes.description:
VASELINE PETROLEUM JELLY 100 GR

Vaseline Petroleum Jelly is the original wonder jelly. Perfect for both skin care and lip care, not only is it clinically proven to help restore dry skin, but it can also be used as an effective lip balm, helping relieve chapped lips by replenishing moisture. Made of 100% pure petroleum jelly, Vaseline is triple purified to ensure that it's gentle on your skin, hypoallergenic and non-comedogenic (won't clog your pores). It makes a soothing dressing for nappy rash, chafing, sore lips, minor burns, cuts and rough hands. Moreover, it protects your skin from windburn and chapping and helps reduce the appearance of fine, dry lines. Vaseline literally melts into the skin, flowing into the tiny cracks caused by dryness where moisture is needed most. That's why Vaseline acts as a powerful skin moisturiser, providing a barrier against water loss from already dry skin and helping protect against the effects of weather and exposure. Vaseline believes that truly healthy skin starts with deep moisture. It’s not something you get by masking problems or using quick fixes. As the original skin experts, we've been safely helping care for skin for over 140 years. It is our goal to make the original, triple-purified Vaseline Petroleum the core of every product because there is no jelly with a longer history of locking in moisture to strengthen skin barrier and protect dry skin.

Vaseline Petroleum Jelly is clinically proven to restore the appearance of dry and cracked skin

Vaseline jelly can be used for both lip care and skin care, relieving dry skin and chapped lips by replenishing moisture

Our petroleum jelly also helps soothe minor cuts, scrapes and burns, and protects from the drying effects of wind and cold weather

Made with 100% pure petroleum jelly that has been triple purified and dermatologically tested for a moisuriser that delivers

Vaseline jelly can be used a lip balm to rescue dry lips and moisturiser to leave skin moisturised and protected

Vaseline is committed to understanding and supporting skin health for all types of skin so that everybody can enjoy healthy skin

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Tresemme Hairspray Extra Hold 75 g

Powered by Pro Lock Tech, TRESemme Extra Hold Hairspray achieves maximum hold without stiffness, so hair still feels flexible. With a hold level of 4 out of 5, this humidity-resistant styling spray locks in moisture and locks out frizz, giving you the extra control and grip you need to tame flyaways. Its fast-drying, water-free formula leaves no sticky residue and brushes out easily, helping you wear your hair however you want and achieve a style that stays in place all day. For best results, prep your hair with your favourite TRESemme shampoo and conditioner. To apply TRESemme Extra Hold Hairspray, shake the can thoroughly before spraying evenly on dry hair from 20 to 30 cm away, one section at a time. For a stronger hold, layer more coats just where you want more control. For the ultimate body and fullness, flip your hair upside down and spray all over to set. Since our salon beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, our products are designed to help you achieve salon-gorgeous hair every day. These are salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, go to our website.

TRESemme Extra Hold Hairspray achieves maximum hold with extra flyaway control

This fast-drying, water-free hair product provides a flexible hold, keeping your style in place all day

Our hairspray has a hold level of 4 out of 5 so you can tame flyaways and create a smooth, brushable finish

This styling product gives professional-quality staying power without feeling stiff or sticky

Shake the can thoroughly before use, then apply TRESemme hairspray evenly, holding the can 20–30 cm away from hair

Our hair styling spray is PETA approved

Tresemme STYLING HAIRSPRAY EXTRA HOLD HAIRSPRAY 360 GR

Powered by Pro Lock Tech, TRESemme Extra Hold Hairspray achieves maximum hold without stiffness, so hair still feels flexible. With a hold level of 4 out of 5, this humidity-resistant styling spray locks in moisture and locks out frizz, giving you the extra control and grip you need to tame flyaways. Its fast-drying, water-free formula leaves no sticky residue and brushes out easily, helping you wear your hair however you want and achieve a style that stays in place all day. For best results, prep your hair with your favourite TRESemme shampoo and conditioner. To apply TRESemme Extra Hold Hairspray, shake the can thoroughly before spraying evenly on dry hair from 20 to 30 cm away, one section at a time. For a stronger hold, layer more coats just where you want more control. For the ultimate body and fullness, flip your hair upside down and spray all over to set. Since our salon beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, our products are designed to help you achieve salon-gorgeous hair every day. These are salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, go to our website.
